overview.title: Mobile Development Frameworks & Tools
overview.description: Comprehensive mobile development ecosystem covering native iOS/Android development, cross-platform frameworks, and essential tools for building modern mobile applications

resources.name: React Native - Cross-Platform Mobile Framework
resources.shortDesc: Framework for building native mobile apps using React and JavaScript, enabling code sharing across iOS and Android platforms
resources.fullDescription: React Native is a framework for building native mobile applications using React and JavaScript. It allows developers to create truly native mobile apps that run on both iOS and Android using a single codebase. React Native uses the same fundamental UI building blocks as regular iOS and Android apps, providing excellent performance and native user experience.

features.Code Sharing: Up to 90% code reuse between platforms
features.Live Updates: OTA updates without app store approval

bestPractices: Use TypeScript for better development experience
Structure code with clear separation of concerns
Use Hermes engine for better performance

codeSnippet.title: React Native Mobile App Example

resources.name: Flutter - Cross-Platform UI Framework
resources.shortDesc: Google's UI toolkit for building natively compiled applications for mobile, web, and desktop from a single codebase using Dart
resources.fullDescription: Flutter is Google's UI toolkit for building beautiful, natively compiled applications for mobile, web, and desktop from a single codebase. It uses the Dart programming language and provides a rich set of pre-built widgets that follow Material Design and Cupertino design languages. Flutter apps are compiled to native ARM code, ensuring high performance across platforms.

specifications.Platforms: iOS, Android, Web, Windows, macOS, Linux
specifications.Build Tools: Flutter CLI, Android Studio, VS Code

codeSnippet.title: Flutter Mobile App Example

resources.name: Swift - Native iOS Development
resources.shortDesc: Powerful and intuitive programming language for iOS, macOS, watchOS, and tvOS development with modern syntax and safety features
resources.fullDescription: Swift is Apple's powerful and intuitive programming language for iOS, macOS, watchOS, and tvOS development. It combines the performance and efficiency of compiled languages with the simplicity and interactivity of popular scripting languages. Swift is designed to be safe, fast, and expressive, making it ideal for developing high-quality iOS applications.

features.Type Safety: Strong type system prevents runtime errors

bestPractices: Use optionals properly to handle nil values
Use structs over classes when possible
Write unit tests for critical functionality
Use Swift Package Manager for dependencies

codeSnippet.title: Swift iOS App Example

resources.name: Kotlin - Native Android Development
resources.shortDesc: Modern programming language for Android development, fully interoperable with Java and officially supported by Google
resources.fullDescription: Kotlin is a modern programming language that makes developers happier. It's fully interoperable with Java and has been adopted as the preferred language for Android development by Google. Kotlin provides concise syntax, null safety, and powerful features that make Android development more enjoyable and productive.
bestPractices: Use data classes for simple data holders
Use sealed classes for state management

codeSnippet.title: Kotlin Android App Example

resources.name: Ionic - Hybrid Mobile Framework
resources.shortDesc: Open-source framework for building cross-platform mobile, desktop, and web apps using web technologies like HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
resources.fullDescription: Ionic is an open-source framework for building cross-platform mobile, desktop, and web applications using familiar web technologies like HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. It provides a library of pre-built components and tools that make it easy to build high-quality mobile apps that work across platforms while maintaining native-like performance and user experience.
bestPractices: Use Ionic components over custom CSS
Optimize for performance on mobile devices
Use lazy loading for better performance

codeSnippet.title: Ionic Mobile App Example

resources.name: Xamarin - Cross-Platform Framework
resources.shortDesc: Microsoft's framework for building native iOS, Android, and Windows apps with C# and .NET, now part of .NET MAUI
resources.fullDescription: Xamarin is Microsoft's cross-platform framework for building native mobile apps using C# and .NET. It allows developers to share up to 90% of code across platforms while maintaining native performance and user experience. Xamarin.Forms provides a single UI codebase, while Xamarin.iOS and Xamarin.Android offer platform-specific development. It's now part of .NET MAUI for modern cross-platform development.

specifications.Development: Visual Studio, Visual Studio for Mac

bestPractices: Follow MVVM pattern for maintainable code

codeSnippet.title: Xamarin.Forms App Example
